summary: Admin Security Dashboard testing complete. All 12 features verified: Dashboard loads, shows threat level, stats cards, tabs work, real-time activity feed, IP blocking/unblocking, IP investigation, auto-refresh, admin-only access. Backend tests: 18/18 passed. Frontend UI: all elements verified.
features_tested: Admin Security Dashboard loads at /app/admin/security - PASS
Dashboard shows Threat Level badge (LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH/CRITICAL) - PASS (Shows 'Threat Level: LOW')
Stats cards display: Active Blocks, Security Events, Failed Logins, Whitelisted IPs - PASS (All 4 cards visible)
Tabs work: Overview, Blocked IPs, Suspicious Users, Activity Log, Investigate IP - PASS (All 5 tabs clickable)
Real-time Activity Feed shows recent events - PASS (Shows security events like ADMIN_IP_UNBLOCKED, SECURITY_IP_BLOCKED)
Block IP button opens modal - PASS (Modal with IP Address, Reason, Duration fields)
IP blocking works through modal - PASS (API tested: POST /api/security/ip/block returns success)
IP unblocking works from Blocked IPs tab - PASS (API tested: POST /api/security/ip/unblock returns success)
IP investigation search works - PASS (Search input and button functional)
Dashboard auto-refreshes every 30 seconds - PASS (Code review confirms setInterval 30000ms)
Dashboard only accessible to admin users - PASS (Non-admin API calls return 403)
Security Dashboard link visible in Dashboard for admin users - PASS (data-testid='admin-security-link' visible)
critical_code_review_comments: Security Dashboard implementation is well-structured with proper admin-only access control
All API endpoints correctly use get_admin_user dependency for admin-only access
Real-time activity feed properly fetches from audit logs collection
IP blocking/unblocking workflow is complete with proper audit logging
Tab navigation and data loading is efficient with parallel API calls
Block IP modal has proper input validation (IP address, reason, duration 1-720 hours)
seed_data_creation: Test IPs blocked and unblocked during testing (10.0.0.94, 172.16.0.x, 192.168.99.99)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Security Dashboard fully functional. Features: 5 tabs (Overview, Blocked IPs, Suspicious Users, Activity Log, Investigate IP), threat level badge shows LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH/CRITICAL based on event count, stats cards show real-time counts, Block IP modal allows blocking IPs for 1-720 hours with reason, IP investigation allows searching IP activity history, auto-refresh every 30 seconds. All admin-only endpoints correctly deny non-admin users with 403. Non-admin users don't see Security Dashboard link in Dashboard.
